delivery_modes.label: Python Replay
delivery_modes.use_when: direct HTTP replay is sufficient and browser-only state is already modeled

delivery_modes.label: JSRPC Bridge
delivery_modes.use_when: signing logic or browser context must be kept in a live JS runtime

delivery_modes.label: Proxy Injector
delivery_modes.use_when: the goal is to patch or augment traffic in Burp, mitmproxy, or a similar interception stack
